meta.title: Lockheed Martin's VECTIS aims to be  MORE than a loyal wingman
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

Last week, Lockheed Martin finally dropped the curtain on its new stealth drone fighter, known as Vectis — a single-engine low observable tactical aircraft designed to serve in a “loyal wingman” role for advanced stealth fighters like upgraded F-22s, F-35s, and of course, Boeing’s new F-47 air superiority fighter that’s making its way toward service.
